articles.title: Canada vs. South Africa odds, prediction, time: 2026 World Cup Round of 32 picks from expert on 18-8 roll - CBS Sports
articles.description: SportsLine's Martin Green reveals his South Africa vs. Canada best bets for their FIFA World Cup 2026 match as the knockout round begins
articles.content: A spot in the 2026 World Cup Round of 16 will be on the line when South Africa meet Canada as the knockout round begins on Sunday. South Africa finished second in Group A, behind Mexico, while co-hos… [+3421 chars]
